📚 Chapter 6: Additional Resources

 💡
Prompt Is a Workflow
Understanding how structured prompts enable procurement teams to systematically evaluate vendors.
6 min read
 🔌
What is MCP?
The protocol that enables AI agents to pull real-time pricing and product data.
8 min read
